contact.heroDesc: Our team is available to answer all your questions and support you with your real estate projects.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill in the form and we will get back to you promptly

agence.title: The Agency
agence.heroDesc: A premier real estate agency in Kinshasa, DRC, combining international expertise with Congolese authenticity since 2025.
agence.servicesSubtitle: Complete solutions for all your real estate needs
agence.serviceSaleDesc: Personalised support for every transaction, from search to signature
agence.serviceRentalDesc: Full property management and rigorous monitoring of your investments
agence.serviceInvestmentDesc: Expert advice to maximise your return on investment
agence.serviceProjectsDesc: Exclusive opportunities on upcoming real estate developments
agence.kinshasaDesc: Heart of Central Africa, Kinshasa is a rapidly expanding metropolis. We know every neighbourhood, every opportunity.
agence.historyP1: Founded in 2025, Senzedy Agency was born from a bold vision: to democratise access to quality real estate in Kinshasa while preserving Congolese authenticity.
agence.historyP2: Our team combines international expertise with deep knowledge of the local market, offering our clients exceptional service adapted to Congolese realities.
agence.historyP3: We believe every Congolese deserves access to quality housing and transparent investment opportunities. This conviction guides everything we do.
agence.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide every action we take
agence.excellenceDesc: International standards applied to the local market
agence.communityDesc: Together for success, in service of Kinshasa
agence.visionDesc: Innovation and anticipation of market trends
agence.contactSubtitle: Our team is ready to help you realise your projects
agence.ceoQuote1: I didn't follow the conventional path. No prestigious school, no framed diploma. Just an obsession: understanding space, transforming it, giving it value.
agence.ceoQuote2Prefix: It's this obsession that led me to build
agence.ceoQuote2Suffix: — not as just another agency, but as an ecosystem designed for those who want to invest wisely, live better, and leave nothing to chance.
agence.ceoVisionText: To put you in front of tomorrow's opportunities before everyone else sees them, exclusively, with the tools, structure and experience to make the most of them.

projets.bestPricesDesc: Benefit from preferential rates and significant appreciation potential before delivery.
projets.verifiedProjectsDesc: We select only the most reliable developers with a proven delivery track record.
projets.fullSupportDesc: Our team supports you every step of the way, from reservation to key handover.
projets.ctaSubtitle: Our experts will guide you in choosing the ideal project.

divers.coolingDesc: Installation, repair and maintenance of air conditioners and cold rooms
divers.securityDesc: CCTV surveillance system installation for your security
